title: RINSE Trace Event
description: Minimal normalized trace event shape accepted by the RINSE v0 reference pipeline.

id.description: Stable source trace identifier. RINSE stores this as a back-reference and must not mutate the source trace.

ts.description: Optional timestamp for the source trace event.

actor.description: Optional actor category that produced the trace event.

text.description: Human-readable content interpreted by the RINSE pipeline.

context.description: Optional source-specific metadata carried through by adapters.
